# ELETECH Solutions

ELETECH Solutions is a high-tech AI & Automation Agency specializing in transforming business operations through custom artificial intelligence implementation, software development, and strategic technology advisory.

## Core Services
- AI Strategy & Implementation
- Custom Software Development
- Business Process Automation
- Cloud Engineering & Scalable Infrastructure
- IT Advisory & Digital Transformation

## Key Sections
- Home: Overview of capabilities and value proposition.
- About: Company mission and leadership team.
- Services: Detailed breakdown of AI and engineering offerings.
- Case Studies: Real-world impact stories of client transformations.
- Careers: Open positions for AI engineers and developers.
- Contact: Inquiries for business partnerships.

## Project Vision
To empower enterprise and medium-sized businesses by bridging the gap between cutting-edge AI research and practical, high-ROI operational applications.

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- CMS: Sanity.io
- Analytics: Vercel Analytics

## Contact Information
- Website: https://eletech.io
- Location: Global / Remote First
